blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding invoice currency lock after confirmation.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Invoice currency lock after confirmation', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to the locking of the invoice currency. While there are multiple passed steps indicating successful bookings, none of them directly address whether the currency was locked after confirmation, which is critical for this requirement. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of specific evidence regarding the currency lock mechanism.
